summary: Phase 2 foundation is accepted by the independent Claude Code CLI checker. The random event scheduler, hidden mood system, and behavior settings modules are deterministic, unit-tested, and integrated with the renderer. Deferred Phase 2 features were not implemented.
evidence: scripts/verify-phase2.ps1 passed according to the checker and will be re-run before final reporting.
src/shared/randomEventScheduler.ts uses a seeded LCG PRNG; shouldFire() blocks random events when randomEventBlocked is true; low-resource mode increases the effective interval.

src/shared/randomEventScheduler.test.ts covers deterministic same-seed output, different-seed divergence, blocked state, interval checks, low-resource multiplier behavior, pickEvent behavior, and empty-pool errors.
src/shared/moodSystem.ts keeps mood as bounded hidden state, applies clamped mood effects, drifts toward neutral, and exposes categories instead of raw UI state.
src/shared/moodSystem.test.ts covers initialization, bounds, clamping, positive and negative drift, zero-cross prevention, categories, and reset.
src/shared/behaviorSettings.ts defines default random-event interval and low-resource multiplier behavior.
src/shared/behaviorSettings.test.ts covers defaults, toggles, interval override, effective interval with and without multiplier, and reset.
src/App.tsx blocks random events while the pet is dragging or exploding, runs low-frequency random speech bubbles, and does not render raw numeric mood.
loop/reports/phase-2-acceptance.md documents modules, verification results, manual GUI checks, and forbidden features not implemented.
The checker found no todo/reminder system, image pixelator, custom character manager, startup launch, hotkeys, sound packs, plugin system, backend, or remote upload implementation.
manual_verification_required: Random event speech bubbles appear only at low frequency - check GUI over time.
Random events do not interrupt dragging or exploding - check GUI.
Hidden mood is not shown as raw numeric UI - inspect GUI.
Low-resource mode visibly reduces optional random behavior - requires a future settings surface or dev-tools toggle.
next_maker_instruction: Phase 2 foundation is accepted. Set phase-state.json to goal_met with requiresHumanApproval=true, then wait for human approval before any deferred Phase 2 features or Phase 3.
